title: Is this Eva 06
wikitext:
[]: Is this Eva-06 [Spoiler]             Quote Post by danlim7 » Wed Oct 28, 2009 10:35 pm Please click on the spoiler button to see Eva-06 below. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Wed Oct 28, 2009 10:36 pm In my opinion its a fanmade repaiinted Unit 01.

[]:             Quote Post by Jesterhead » Wed Oct 28, 2009 10:42 pm Well it's definitely trying to be Mark-06. Whether it official or not though...

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Oct 29, 2009 12:18 am Sure is pretty though.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Thu Oct 29, 2009 3:59 am Unofficial (first came up on THAT BOARD, the guy who posted it said he found it on Pixiv), and yes, it is a drawing of the Mark06, based on a shot from the trailer for 3.0.

[]:             Quote Post by Napul » Thu Oct 29, 2009 6:28 am SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Oct 29, 2009 6:30 am You guys don't have to use spoiler tags.

[]:             Quote Post by jag777 » Thu Oct 29, 2009 10:01 am MARK 06 SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Thu Oct 29, 2009 10:17 am Joseph the PRPD wrote: You guys don't have to use spoiler tags.

[]:             Quote Post by roblucci01 » Thu Oct 29, 2009 12:46 pm I personally think Unit 06 looks great. I can't wait to see Kaworu doing all kinds of crazy shit on it.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Oct 29, 2009 1:20 pm Epic fanarts, bro.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Oct 29, 2009 1:39 pm Fanart but they have been right before so who knows. I want a berserker battle between our beloved Yui and 06.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Thu Oct 29, 2009 1:55 pm [URL=http://img193.imageshack.us/img193/2681/eva06.png] [/URL] This is a full body composite of Mark06 made using footage from the 1.0 TV edition, which had actual, 2.0 pictures inserted to it's end as a teaser for 2.0 (click for bigger). This one is a scan of a gift card. It's official. This is what Mark06 looks like (pretty as Hell). EDIT: I know it's a bit late to mention, but both picks have been posted by other people on this very site. That's why i was pretty baffled to see people speculating about Mark06's looks. 


[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Thu Oct 29, 2009 4:24 pm Indeed.

[]:             Quote Post by iggy456 » Thu Oct 29, 2009 4:48 pm Epic win.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Thu Oct 29, 2009 11:01 pm iggy456 wrote: Eipc win.

[]:             Quote Post by trueno_twentyone » Fri Oct 30, 2009 10:51 am I want to see Mark 06 in actual combat....

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Oct 30, 2009 11:20 am Yeah, that eva is basically a palate swap of 01, with a pierced horn and a pair of gigantic Oakley's. All it needs is a tribal tattoo on the small of it's back and we officially have the rebellious teenage daughter eva.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sat Oct 31, 2009 2:05 am Another thing that strikes me about Mark06's design is that it seems to be far more spindly than the other Evas. Sleeker and taller, like a throwback to the original anorexic Eva designs of the series. It makes sense when you consider that it was grown (or whatever) in a low G environment (the Moon), but it also reinforces the "shadow" concept: it's less substantial, downright fickle compared to it's counterpart, Eva-01. Or maybe the design went along the lines of bishie pilot->bishie Eva, and i'm looking way to deeply into things.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Oct 31, 2009 3:22 am More likely it's exactly the same as the other evas and just looked longer in that preview shot for dramatic effect... sort of like the 40-200 meter height range.
